items.title: The cost of the first week of the war in Iran exceeded 11 billion dollars.

items.title: Kanye West ordered to pay $140K in Malibu mansion renovation lawsuit
items.dek: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.
items.body: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.

items.title: Justified or not? US military families on fears of Iran war
items.dek: BBC's North America editor Sarah Smith spoke to Gold Star mum Lynn, whose son died in the Iraq War, and veteran Jeremy.
items.body: BBC's North America editor Sarah Smith spoke to Gold Star mum Lynn, whose son died in the Iraq War, and veteran Jeremy.
